entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: Essential element and limiting factor in ecosystems and crop production

entities.name: ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Biological communities where nitrogen is often the most limiting element

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food, limited by nitrogen availability

entities.name: SYNTHETIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical nitrogen sources whose overuse compromises soil health and sustainability

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The biological and chemical state of soil, negatively impacted by agrochemicals

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain agricultural productivity without environmental degradation

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: A biological process that converts atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form

entities.name: NITROGEN-FIXING MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Microbes that possess the ability to perform biological nitrogen fixation

entities.name: BIOFERTILIZERS
entities.description: Agricultural products formulated from efficient nitrogen-fixing microorganisms

entities.name: NON-FIXING MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Microbes that do not naturally fix nitrogen but could potentially acquire the ability

entities.name: NON-LEGUMINOUS PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that do not naturally fix nitrogen, including high-value crops

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: A category of non-leguminous plants targeted for the transfer of nitrogen fixation capacity

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION CAPACITY
entities.description: The biological trait allowing an organism to fix atmospheric nitrogen
